name: Vern Buchanan
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $368,633 for Vern Buchanan in U.S. House, FL-16. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
